_meta.purpose: Swappable content. Brand voice defaults populated from senior-dev defaults + COMPETITIVE-INTEL.md patterns. When the client intake form returns, values here get swapped in-place with no DOM changes required.
_meta.voice: Bold, modern, straight to the point, real, creative, customer-first; fast without cutting corners.

brand.name: Hatfield McCoy DTF
brand.story_short: Custom DTF heat transfers, gang sheets, sublimation, and specialty prints — designed, printed, and shipped fast from Logan, West Virginia. Bold, modern, straight to the point, and customer-first.
brand.story_long: Founded in 2022 in Logan, West Virginia, Hatfield McCoy DTF keeps custom printing bold, modern, and straight to the point. We move fast without cutting corners — getting your custom prints designed, printed, and out the door quick while keeping you updated from order to delivery. Every sheet that leaves the shop has to earn its place on the press: clean edges, strong color, no fade, no crack, no peel. If you can picture it, we help you get it pressed.

tat.rush: Rush/expedited service available for a flat $10 when schedule allows
tat.note: All turnaround times start once artwork and payment are ready. Same-day pickup cutoff needs final confirmation; contact us for same-day availability.

shipping.heading: Shipping, Pickup & Turnaround
shipping.policy: Domestic flat-rate shipping is $10. Overnight shipping is available for $32. Orders of $300 or more qualify for free shipping. International shipping is available. Local pickup is available at 311 George Kostas Dr, Logan, WV 25601 during Mon-Fri 9am-9pm shop hours.
shipping.body: Domestic flat-rate shipping is $10. Overnight shipping is available for $32. Orders of $300 or more qualify for free shipping. International shipping is available. Local pickup is available at 311 George Kostas Dr, Logan, WV 25601 during Mon-Fri 9am-9pm shop hours.
shipping.cutoff: Same-day pickup cutoff still has conflicting intake answers: one page says 3pm and another says no cutoff. Public copy uses the safe version: contact us for same-day availability.
shipping.packaging: Flat sheets ship rolled or flat-packed between stiff boards. Larger rolls go in a tube.
shipping.international: International shipping is available; final options and timing are confirmed at checkout or by quote.
shipping.free_shipping: Free shipping on orders of $300 or more.
shipping.pickup: Local pickup: 311 George Kostas Dr, Logan, WV 25601 · Mon-Fri 9am-9pm

hero.lede: Custom DTF heat transfers, gang sheets, sublimation, and specialty prints — designed, printed, and shipped fast from Logan, West Virginia. No pretreatment. No minimums. No feud between you and a clean print.

story_section.headline_line_1: One last feud the mountains will settle —
story_section.paragraph: Founded in 2022, we keep custom printing bold, modern, and straight to the point. We move fast without cutting corners, keep customers updated from order to delivery, and make sure every sheet lands how they pictured it.

armory.headline: Pick your weapon.
armory.subhead: Existing catalog items remain as-is. Additional services are shown with their correct status: live catalog, contact us, contact Jessie, coming soon, or details/pricing pending.

steps.title: Upload
steps.desc: Send your art. PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS up to 50 MB. Transparent PNG at 300 DPI gives the cleanest print.

steps.title: Print
steps.desc: In-stock transfers turn in about 24 hours; custom gang sheets are about 48 hours once artwork and payment are ready.

steps.title: Press
steps.desc: Press with the instructions included in your order. Rush service is available for a flat $10 when the schedule allows.

faq.question: How long does production take?
faq.answer: In-stock transfers are about 24 hours. Custom gang sheets are about 48 hours once artwork and payment are ready. Rush/expedited service is available for a flat $10 when the schedule allows.

faq.question: How much is shipping?
faq.answer: Domestic flat-rate shipping is $10. Overnight shipping is available for $32. Orders of $300 or more qualify for free shipping. International shipping is available.

faq.question: Do you offer local pickup?
faq.answer: Yes. Local pickup is available at 311 George Kostas Dr, Logan, WV 25601 during Mon-Fri 9am-9pm shop hours. Same-day cutoff needs final confirmation, so contact us for same-day availability.

faq.question: What file formats do you accept?
faq.answer: PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, and EPS up to 50 MB. Transparent PNG at 300 DPI gives the cleanest print. If your file is not ready, send what you have and we will help you clean it up.

faq.question: What garments or brands work with your transfers?
faq.answer: DTF works on cotton, polyester, blends, nylon, and leather. The client specifically asked us to display Gildan, Bella+Canvas, and Comfort Colors as compatible brand examples.

faq.question: Is there a minimum order?
faq.answer: No minimum on standard transfer orders. One sheet is fine. Run one, run a hundred — same clean quality either way.

faq.question: Do you offer UV DTF, embroidery, laser engraving, banners, stickers, and personalized items?
faq.answer: Yes, several additional services are being listed. Some are contact-us or contact-Jessie services, and some are coming soon or need final price/SKU details before becoming purchaseable online.

faq.question: How does the gang sheet builder work?
faq.answer: The current launch path sends customers to the Shopify product where Kixxl can render the builder. Kixxl setup help is still open; the quote form remains the safe fallback if the builder is not ready.

reviews.summary_line: 47+ shops running our transfers. Zero complaints on wash durability.

featured.quote: Colors didn't fade after 40 washes. Best transfers we've run.
featured.author: Rowan B.

featured.quote: Ordered Friday, picked up Monday. Clean edges, dead-true color. Switching our whole shop over.
featured.author: Mara K.

featured.quote: Glow DTF held up through a 5K and two washes. My runners were stoked.
featured.author: Jess T.

footer.tagline: Bold custom prints, founded in 2022 and pressed in Logan, West Virginia. Run loud, run proud, ship fast.

cart.empty_state: Your cart's empty. Fire up a sheet.
cart.error_state: Couldn't update the cart. Try again or refresh the page.
cart.shipping_note: Shipping: $10 domestic flat rate, $32 overnight option, free shipping at $300+; taxes calculated at checkout.
cart.checkout_note: Shipping: $10 domestic flat rate, $32 overnight option, free shipping at $300+; taxes calculated at checkout.

form_errors.network_offline: You're offline. Reconnect and try again — your answers are saved.
form_errors.timeout: Took too long to send. Your answers are saved — try again when you're ready.
form_errors.webhook_error: Couldn't reach the server. Your answers are saved — try again in a minute.
form_errors.validation_email: Please enter a valid email address.
form_errors.validation_email_and_name: We need your name and email so we can follow up.
form_errors.spam_cooldown: One sec — please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.
form_errors.spam_cooldown_generic: Hang on — please wait a moment before sending again.
form_errors.payload_too_large: That's a lot of text. Trimming to fit — the gist still gets through.
form_errors.generic: Something went sideways. Try again in a minute.

form_success.thanks_body: Your answers landed in our inbox. We'll pick this up and have the next draft of your store ready within a few days.

pdp.upload_helper: PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, EPS · 50 MB max · 300 DPI recommended
pdp.upload_dropzone_idle: Drop art here or tap to browse
pdp.upload_file_ok: Art looks good. Ready when you are.
pdp.upload_file_too_big: File's over 50 MB. Try again with a smaller export.
pdp.upload_file_bad_format: That format isn't on the list. Try PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS.

about.heading: Founded in 2022. Built for fast custom print work.
about.body: Founded in 2022 in Logan, West Virginia, Hatfield McCoy DTF keeps custom printing bold, modern, and straight to the point. We move fast without cutting corners — getting your custom prints designed, printed, and out the door quick while keeping you updated from order to delivery. Every sheet that leaves the shop has to earn its place on the press: clean edges, strong color, no fade, no crack, no peel. If you can picture it, we help you get it pressed.

contact.heading: Questions? We'll answer in a holler.
contact.body: Call (304) 688-9970 or email HatfieldandMcCoydtf@gmail.com. Instagram: @Hatfieldnmccoydtf. Facebook and YouTube are linked below. TikTok is N/A.

builder.heading: Custom Gang Sheet Builder
builder.body: Build custom gang sheets through the Shopify/Kixxl path when setup is complete. If the builder is not ready, use the quote form and the shop will follow up.
builder.fallback_body: Tell us the sheet size, quantity, artwork files, and deadline. Kixxl setup is still marked as needing help, so this quote form stays available as the safe fallback.
